title: e2e tests create files in tree
body:
I just noticed that the e2e tests create files in the tree:
```
test/e2e/default.yaml
test/e2e/hello.tar
test/e2e/relative/
```

I did not examine it any further but want to leave the breadcrumbs here.  Tests should only create temporary files/directories and not alter the local tree.

comments.body: `/test/e2e/relative` is from me in #12853 and #13531. For that PR putting the relative dir in the tmpdir failed because for some reason `build -f`... could not find the directory if it was in there.  Not sure if I was just doing it wrong, if so I can make a quick patch resolving it.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
